# Jason Chen — Full-Stack Engineer

Full-stack engineer with 8+ years of experience building enterprise-grade systems. Delivered 124 projects across factory automation, AI-powered quality analysis, cross-platform mobile, and healthcare domains. Expert in TypeScript/NestJS backends, React/Next.js frontends, and Docker Swarm deployments with GitLab CI/CD. Integrates LangGraph and Azure OpenAI to build agentic workflows for enterprise internal tools.

## Contact

- Email: jason.chen.develop@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jason-cj-chen
- GitHub: https://github.com/jasonChen0604

## Site Sections

- / — Hero and featured projects overview
- /skills — 9 skill domains with proficiency levels (expert/proficient/familiar)
- /projects — All 124 projects with filters by domain, status, and category
- /experience — 23 product groups organized by business domain
- /about — How this site was built (data pipeline and tech stack)
